TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mknahuy, title = Mknahuy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mknahuy} }

S.FORM: alang Mknahuy ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 115 buwan, 321 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 77% kyan ku 248 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 23% kyan ku 73 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 74%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mknahuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Mknahuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mknahuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mknahuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mknahuy hya' ga Mksuzing. tay mkyahu' na Mknahuy hya' ga Mkzihing. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Mknahuy ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 115 buwan, 321 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 77% kyan ku 248 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 23% kyan ku 73 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 74%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mknahuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Mknahuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mknahuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mknahuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mknahuy hya' ga Mksuzing. tay mkyahu' na Mknahuy hya' ga Mkzihing. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mknaħuj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mknaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mknaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mknaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mknaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mknaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa mks~ɕuziŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mknaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa mkziħiŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
